name: SuperPawn
description_short: Las Vegas pawn shop SuperPawn at 300 N Nellis Blvd offers quick loans and merchandise buying with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
SuperPawn's 300 N Nellis Blvd location in Las Vegas operates from 9 AM to 8 PM Monday through Saturday, with Sunday hours from 12 PM to 5 PM. This standalone store sits conveniently on the north side of Las Vegas, NV, serving the local community with accessible pawn shop services.

At this Las Vegas SuperPawn branch, customers can obtain quick pawn loans, sell jewelry and electronics, or explore the store's selection of merchandise. Contact the location at +1 702-438-2200 for questions about specific items, loan terms, or appointment availability.

For Las Vegas residents and visitors needing quick cash or looking to sell valuables, the Nellis Boulevard SuperPawn provides a straightforward pawn experience. Bring a valid government-issued ID and any items you wish to pawn or sell.
address: 300 N Nellis Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89110

company_info.headquarters: 300 N Nellis Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89110

pros: Massive network of 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America for convenient access
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no wage garnishment or credit reporting if loan isn't repaid
No credit check required—accessible to consumers with poor or no credit history
Fast cash funding with immediate payment (as stated: 'Get a Pawn Loan Fast')
Wide variety of accepted merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments)
Layaway service offering affordable 10% down payment option as credit alternative
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) providing financial transparency and stability
cons: Lose collateral permanently if pawn loan isn't repaid—high risk for valuable personal possessions
Pawn loans don't build credit history, leaving borrowers in same financial position after repayment
Interest rates and fees not disclosed on website, making true cost of borrowing unclear upfront
Non-recourse structure benefits lender more than borrower—lender gets collateral plus interest if default occurs
Layaway service ties up cash for extended periods with only 10% down—limited liquidity access
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history who need immediate cash and have valuable collateral
People needing short-term emergency funds who prefer to avoid payday loans and predatory lending
Individuals with jewelry, electronics, or other merchandise they own outright and can temporarily pledge
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking layaway alternatives to full upfront payment for retail purchases
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers with limited credit access who own valuable collateral and need fast cash without credit checks or wage garnishment risk. The primary caveat is that defaulted loans result in permanent loss of the pledged item, and successful repayment builds no credit history—making this a survival-mode lending solution rather than a path to financial improvement.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (non-recourse)
Gold and precious metal buying—immediate cash payment
Retail sales of merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Cash advance on items customers bring in (stated: 'pay you cash on the spot')
Store locator service across 2,500+ North and Latin American locations
Online inventory browsing of available merchandise
Item search and 'hunting' service on store shelves
Pawn FAQ educational content and resources
Multiple payment and transaction options across retail locations
meta_description: SuperPawn at 300 N Nellis Blvd, Las Vegas, NV. Quick pawn loans and merchandise buying with extended hours.
